proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: Why Operator Consultancies Run Their Own Experiments (And What You Get)
proposal.one_line_angle: Most consulting firms sell strategy decks; an AI lab is what turns recommendations into field-tested playbooks before they ever hit a client engagement, and that changes the risk profile of every project.
outline_bullets: What an AI lab actually is (and why most consultancies do not run one)
How a lab pipeline turns risky experiments into client-ready playbooks
What lab-tested AI means for your consulting timeline, budget, and integration risk
